---
title: "Software"
description: "Research software and code."
---

::: {.project-card}
### RandomizedLinearAlgebra.jl

A Julia package for direct randomized linear solvers based on sketching, and low-rank approximation.
The package supports automatic differentiation for estimating the adjoints with respect to the parameters of the randomized algorithmic maps.

**Status:** Research grade. (Production version coming soon.)
:::
